from pathlib import Path
import re

def raw_strip(line: str) -> str:
    return line.rstrip('\\r\\n').strip()

def append_before_eol(line: str, suffix: str) -> str:
    if line.endswith('\\r\\n'):
        return line[:-2] + suffix + '\\r\\n'
    if line.endswith('\\n'):
        return line[:-1] + suffix + '\\n'
    return line + suffix

def has_if_opener(lines, close_index):
    j = close_index
    while j >= 0:
        s = raw_strip(lines[j])
        if re.search(r'\\bif\\s*\\(', s):
            return True
        if j "'!= close_index and (s.endswith('"';') or s in {'{', '}'} or s.startswith('#')):
            return False
        j -= 1
    return False

changed=[]
for p in Path('.').rglob('*'):
    if p.suffix not in ('.cpp', '.h'):
        continue
    if '3rd_parties' in p.parts or any(part.startswith('build') for part in p.parts):
        continue
    text = p.read_bytes().decode('utf-8')
    lines = text.splitlines(keepends=True)
    out=[]
    i=0
    count=0
    while i < len(lines):
        if (
            i + 1 < len(lines)
            and re.fullmatch(r'\\)+', raw_strip(lines[i]))
            and raw_strip(lines[i + 1]) == '{'
            and has_if_opener(lines, i)
        ):
            out.append(append_before_eol(lines[i], '{'))
            i += 2
            count += 1
            continue
        out.append(lines[i])
        i += 1
    if count:
        p.write_text(''.join(out), encoding='utf-8', newline='')
        changed.append((p, count))
for p, count in changed:
    print(f'{p}: {count}')
print(f'files={len(changed)} replacements={sum(c for _, c in changed)}')
